director.name: Gunnar Hall Jensen Gunnar Hall Jensen

introduction: In this feature, we meet an eclectic group of people in the remote Norwegian valley of Hessdalen. In their own, different ways, they are influenced, mesmerised and shaped by the mysterious light phenomena in the sky above them. Both belief and disbelief come together in a community bound by circumstance, encompassing those who are born and raised in the valley, and those who visit time and again, eager to witness the phenomena.
